3. Load linked files from the same skill bundle before making changes.

When to use:

Design and review concurrent Java and Spring Boot code for thread pools, async work, locking, and reliability. Use when fixing race conditions, thread pool exhaustion, deadlocks, lost tasks, unsafe shared state, or async error handling in Java services.
